# Re-Sound

> Re-Sound is a Belgian B2B brand of circular acoustic panels — sound-absorbing wall, ceiling, and freestanding panels made from recycled textiles, FSC-certified wood veneer, and recycled PET. Manufactured in Europe with a free take-back service for closed-loop circularity.

Re-Sound is a brand of STRETCH-BE BV, based in Beveren-Waas, Belgium. Products are sold to architects, interior designers, office fit-out specialists, and educational/healthcare facilities across the EU.

## Product families

The catalog is organised into three material families. Each product page lists acoustic performance (αw, NRC), fire classification, dimensions, color/finish options, and installation method.

- [Interior — Modular acoustic wall panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/interior): Modular textile-covered wall panels in 600×600 mm and 600×1200 mm formats. Class A sound absorption. Recycled-textile core. Removable, washable cover. Made in Belgium.
- [Solid — Large-format acoustic wall panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/solid): Large-format wall panels for high-impact sound absorption in offices, restaurants, and cultural spaces. Hook installation. Recycled-textile core. Made in Belgium.
- [Divide — Freestanding acoustic dividers](https://re-sound.be/en/products/divide): Freestanding acoustic screens with magnetic modular connection. Dual-sided absorption. Flexible space management. Recycled-textile construction. Made in Belgium.
- [rWood Groove — Grooved acoustic wood panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/rwood-groove): Premium grooved acoustic panels with FSC-certified wood veneer on a recycled-felt core. Class A absorption. Natural oak and walnut finishes. Made in Europe.
- [rWood Perf — Perforated acoustic wood panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/rwood-perf): Classic perforated wood acoustic panels with FSC-certified veneer. Broadband absorption. Tunable acoustic performance. Multiple perforation patterns. Made in Europe.
- [rWood Micro — Micro-perforated acoustic wood panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/rwood-micro): Precision micro-perforated acoustic wood panels. Dual absorption mechanism. Highest fire safety rating. Backlit option available. FSC certified. Made in Europe.
- [rWood Panel — Wood-veneer acoustic panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/rwood-veneer): Smooth wood-veneer acoustic panels. 10 curated species. Furniture-grade construction. EPD available. FSC certified. Made in Europe.
- [rPET Panel — Flat recycled-PET acoustic panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/rpet-panel): Versatile flat acoustic panels from 100% recycled PET (post-consumer bottles). Process like MDF — cut, mill, drill, paint. OEKO-TEX® certified. Class A+ VOC emissions. Made in Belgium.
- [rPET Groove — Grooved recycled-PET acoustic panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/rpet-groove): Grooved acoustic panels in 100% recycled PET. 12 designer colors. 3 thicknesses (12, 24, 36 mm). B-s1,d0 fire rating. OEKO-TEX® certified. Made in Belgium.
- [rPET Flex Groove — Flexible recycled-PET panels](https://re-sound.be/en/products/rpet-flex-groove): Flexible grooved acoustic panels from 100% recycled PET. Bendable for curved surfaces, columns, and bespoke installations. OEKO-TEX® certified. Made in Belgium.

## About

- [About Re-Sound](https://re-sound.be/en/about): Company background, manufacturing partners, certifications, and the founding story behind STRETCH-BE BV.
- [Sustainability](https://re-sound.be/en/sustainability): Circular economy model, recycled-content figures per product line, take-back program, FSC and OEKO-TEX® certifications, end-of-life processing.
- [Blog](https://re-sound.be/en/blog): Articles on acoustics, circular economy, and sustainable interior design.

## Contact & commercial

- [Contact](https://re-sound.be/en/contact): Sales contact form. Email: info@re-sound.be. Sales territory: Belgium, Netherlands, France, Germany, Luxembourg, and the wider EU.
- Lead generation: PDF product datasheets are available via a lead-capture form on each product page.

## Languages

The site is available in 10 languages: English (default), Dutch, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Danish, Swedish, Norwegian, and Icelandic. Replace `/en/` in any URL with the corresponding language code (`/nl/`, `/fr/`, `/de/`, `/es/`, `/pt/`, `/da/`, `/sv/`, `/no/`, `/is/`).

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://re-sound.be/sitemap.xml): Full machine-readable sitemap covering every page in every language.
- [Privacy policy](https://re-sound.be/en/privacy): How Re-Sound handles personal data under GDPR.
- [Terms of use](https://re-sound.be/en/terms): Website terms of use.
